title: ContentContent
description: The official ContentContent mod from ContentSMP
body:
ContentContent


ContentContent adds a handful of miscellanious features, originally designed for ContentSMP.
Includes:
  • Squirrels
  • Branch blocks
  • Aquarium glass
  • Folly trees
  • Display case
  • Chocolate eggs
  • Equivalence detector
  • Tuff & Calcite block sets
  • Snow & moss layers
  • Braziers
  • Mugs
  • Stickshift (try using a skeleton skull on one)
  • Copper horns
  • Copper & Goat Horn dispenser behavior
  • Iron scaffolding
  • Steel bar
  • Brush backport
  • Suspicious dirt
  • Wrapped bundle
  • Boxing glove
  • Missing Stair, slab and wall variants
  • Magnetized tracker (requires Elysium [currently a private mod] for its crafting recipe)
